arts.ttl: Ajax line up move for Nice midfielder to replace Monaco target Jordan Henderson
arts.sum: According to L’Équipe, Ajax are lining up a move for Nice midfielder Pablo Rosario (28) to replace Monaco target Jordan Henderson (35). Les Monégasques are in negotiations with the Eredivisie club…

arts.ttl: Europa League final day - who is through and what's at stake?
arts.sum: Manchester United, Tottenham and Rangers all have something at stake on what promises to be a thrilling final day of the Europa League league phase.

arts.ttl: Nice predicted XI v Bodo/Glimt: Tanguy Ndombélé and Baptiste Santamaria out
arts.sum: OGC Nice’s fate in the UEFA Europa League is already confirmed; with Franck Haise’s side guaranteed to crash out of the competition at the ‘League Phase’ it is expected that…
